name: Lode Runner
description:
Lode Runner is a 2D platform game where the player controls a character whose objective is to collect all the gold nuggets scattered throughout a level. The levels consist of brick platforms, ladders, and suspended bars. The player can run left and right along platforms, climb ladders, and traverse hand-over-hand across horizontal bars. The player can also fall short distances without penalty, but longer falls will result in death. 

The primary defensive and offensive mechanic involves digging holes. The player can dig a hole to the left or right into the brick platform immediately adjacent and one level *below* the player's current position. These holes are temporary and will fill back in after a few seconds. The player can use these holes to trap enemies (guards) who are pursuing them. If a guard falls into a hole, they will be trapped until the hole refills, at which point the guard will reappear on top of the refilled brick. The player can also walk across a refilling hole without penalty. Guards can pick up gold nuggets, but they will drop them when trapped in a hole or when they die. A player can also collect gold nuggets from inside a hole, before the hole fills back in.

The guards chase the player, and contact with a guard results in the player's death. The player must navigate the levels strategically, using the digging mechanic to avoid or trap the guards while collecting all the gold. After collecting all the gold, the player must reach the exit, which typically appears at the top of the level. Some levels contain false exits. Once the player reaches the true exit, they progress to the next level.

Some levels may require the player to use the falling nuggets as a bridge to be able to collect other nuggets, or to be able to reach the exit.

controls.arrow_left: Move the player character to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player character to the right.
controls.z: Dig a hole to the left of the player.
controls.x: Dig a hole to the right of the player.
